final:
module modulo_operator (
  input [31:0] dividend,
  input [31:0] divisor,
  output reg [31:0] remainder
);

always @(*) begin
  if (divisor == 0) begin
    remainder = 0;
  end else begin
    remainder = dividend % divisor;
  end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      remainder = dividend; if (divisor != 0) begin remainder = 0; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: remainder = dividend; if (divisor != 0) begin remainder = 0; end
